function.name: fetch
function.description:
Fetch HTML content from a URL.

- Retrieves web page content via HTTP/HTTPS
- Optionally extracts text-only content (strips HTML tags)
- No user approval required
- 30 second timeout for requests
- Returns raw HTML or extracted text

url.description: The URL to fetch (must be http:// or https://)

extract_text.description: Extract only text content, removing HTML tags. Default: false
